title: Microalgae
html: Stub. The HS-era Yahir interest in microalgae as a climate-leverage point — "algae is an inevitable byproduct of oceans heating up; instead of fighting this inevitability, leverage the ancient plant" (2020 09 28 experience qb question). One-off in 2020; could promote if it recurs in any later sustainability / triple bottom line doc.
